comments: TV mentions at the beginning of the show that there will be Crash 'N Burn, Extreme, Anthrax, Almighty, Wolfsbane, Almighty, Pantera, L.A. Guns, White Trash, Alice Cooper, Faith No More and more.
TV says that Extreme's More Than Words is number 1 in the American singles chart.
Audio clips of the show are available on the Radio Rewind site.

track_listing.track: Harvester Of Sorrow (album - ...And Justice For All) Elektra
We Don't Need A Reason (single) A&M
Burning Our Bed (album - Hey Stoopid) Epic
The Perfect Crime (v/a album - Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey) Interscope
Milk (Ode To Billy) (album - Attack Of The Killer B's) Island
